risks.title: Language guard over-blocks legitimate JS<->TS resolution
risks.mitigation: js/jsx/ts/tsx/mjs/cjs/mts/cts share one family; same-language test asserts cross-file TS resolution still works

risks.title: Adding call source files to seenFiles inflates node count
risks.mitigation: file-grain nodes are cheap; they were always required for these edges - their absence WAS the bug

decision_records.decision: Two surgical fixes at the two distinct root causes, not a validator relaxation
decision_records.rationale: The validator was correct; the graph was wrong. Fix construction (resolver + node emission), keep GI-2 strict.
